title: neogriseocereus griseus
intro: Neogriseocereus griseus, also known as the Gray Pitaya, is a type of cactus native to Mexico and parts of Central America. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The Gray Pitaya has been traditionally used to treat digestive issues, wounds, and skin conditions, offering several health benefits such as improved digestion, reduced inflammation, and enhanced wound healing. Herbal preparations of Neogriseocereus griseus often include infusions, tinctures, and topical creams, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
